boarding_plans.name: Full Board - Value Stall
boarding_plans.description: Affordable full board in a 12x12 matted stall with daily turnout and use of arenas.

boarding_plans.name: Full Board - Premium Stall
boarding_plans.description: Premium full board with oversized stall, individualized feeding, and priority indoor arena access.

boarding_plans.name: Full Board - Pasture Plus
boarding_plans.description: Full care with large pasture turnout and limited use of outdoor arenas. No indoor arena access.

boarding_plans.name: Full Board - Indoor Priority
boarding_plans.description: Full care stall board with guaranteed indoor arena time and limited turnout.

boarding_plans.name: Partial Board with Turnout
boarding_plans.description: Owner provides feed; barn provides stall, turnout, and basic care.

boarding_plans.name: Partial Board with Indoor Access
boarding_plans.description: Partial care with evening indoor arena access and limited turnout.

boarding_plans.name: Self-Care - Basic Stall
boarding_plans.description: Owner is responsible for all daily care. Stall and facility access included.
otherAmenities: Access to outdoor arena during non-lesson hours

boarding_plans.name: Self-Care Pasture Board
boarding_plans.description: Pasture board with run-in shelter; owner provides feed and daily checks.

boarding_plans.name: Full Board - Value Stall (Waitlist Only)
boarding_plans.description: Same features as Full Board - Value Stall, currently accepting waitlist reservations.

boarding_plans.name: Full Board - Economy Stall
boarding_plans.description: Budget full board with standard stall and shared turnout paddock.

camp_sessions.name: July Week 1 Summer Riding Camp (Ages 8–12)
camp_sessions.description: Five-day beginner-friendly camp focusing on horsemanship, grooming, and riding basics.

camp_sessions.name: July Week 3 Small-Group Camp (Ages 8–12)
camp_sessions.description: Intimate small-group camp with a focus on confidence-building and trail rides.

camp_sessions.name: July Week 2 Intermediate Camp (Ages 10–15)
camp_sessions.description: Stronger riding focus for intermediate riders, including small jumping exercises.

camp_sessions.name: July Week 4 Young Rider Camp (Ages 6–9)
camp_sessions.description: Introductory camp for younger riders with pony rides and games.

camp_sessions.name: June Week 3 Summer Riding Camp (Ages 8–12)
camp_sessions.description: Early summer camp session covering horse care and arena riding.

camp_sessions.name: August Week 1 Summer Riding Camp (Ages 8–12)
camp_sessions.description: Late-summer camp featuring more trail time and mounted games.

camp_sessions.name: Holiday Break Riding Camp
camp_sessions.description: Three-day holiday camp with festive activities and arena riding.

camp_sessions.name: Spring Dressage Clinic with Guest Trainer
camp_sessions.description: Intensive two-day dressage clinic for intermediate and advanced riders.

camp_sessions.name: Summer Jumping Clinic
camp_sessions.description: Day clinic focused on gymnastics and course riding.

camp_sessions.name: July Week 1 Teen Horsemanship Camp (Ages 13–17)
camp_sessions.description: Teen-only camp with advanced groundwork and liberty sessions.

events.title: Summer Open House & Barn Tour
events.description: Meet our horses and staff, tour the barns, watch riding demos, and learn about lessons and camps.

events.title: Family Barn Tour Saturday
events.description: Guided family-friendly barn tours with Q&A and photo opportunities.

events.title: Fall Open House & Riding Showcase
events.description: Seasonal open house featuring riding demonstrations and facility tours.

events.title: Spring Dressage Clinic with Guest FEI Trainer
events.description: Two-day intensive dressage clinic focusing on test accuracy and suppleness.

events.title: Summer Schooling Show
events.description: Introductory schooling show with dressage and hunter/jumper classes.

events.title: Holiday Barn Tour & Toy Drive
events.description: Festive barn tour benefiting local charities; bring a toy to donate.

events.title: Community Open Ride Night
events.description: Bring your horse and ride in our lit outdoor arenas under staff supervision.

events.title: Spring Open House & Barn Tour
events.description: Past open house event from earlier in the year.

gift_card_products.name: Digital e-gift card
gift_card_products.description: Digital gift card delivered by email. Can be scheduled for a future date.

gift_card_products.name: Physical Gift Card (Mailed)
gift_card_products.description: Plastic gift card mailed in a logo card holder. Ships in 3–5 business days.

gift_card_products.name: Printable Gift Voucher
gift_card_products.description: Instantly downloadable PDF voucher you can print at home.

gift_card_products.name: Corporate e-gift Bundle
gift_card_products.description: Bulk-purchase digital gift cards for teams and corporate rewards.

instructors.bio: Specializes in beginner and youth riders with a focus on safety, confidence, and solid fundamentals.
USDF bronze medalist offering dressage-focused instruction from walk–trot up through second level.
Eventing instructor with a knack for helping nervous riders enjoy small jumps and trail obstacles.
Former collegiate IHSA rider teaching balanced seat, group lessons, and intro to canter.
Hunter/jumper coach focusing on course strategy for advanced youth and amateur riders.
Western riding instructor offering lessons in reining basics and trail safety.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner Intro Pack – 4 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Four 60-minute beginner lessons to introduce new riders to the basics.
lesson_packages.terms: Must be used within 3 months of purchase.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner Foundations – 8 Weekday Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Eight beginner lessons scheduled Monday–Friday afternoons.
lesson_packages.terms: Weekday slots only; expires in 4 months.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate Weekend Rider – 10 Lesson Package
lesson_packages.description: Ten 60-minute intermediate lessons available on Saturdays and Sundays.
lesson_packages.terms: Weekend lessons only; package valid for 6 months.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate Weekend Plus – 10 Lessons with Practice Ride
lesson_packages.description: Ten intermediate lessons plus one complimentary supervised practice ride.
lesson_packages.terms: Includes one bonus supervised practice ride; weekends only.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate Progress – 10 Weekday Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Ten intermediate lessons on weekday evenings.
lesson_packages.terms: Monday–Friday after 4 pm; valid for 6 months.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate Tune-Up – 6 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Six lessons focused on refining position and transitions.
lesson_packages.terms: Any day subject to availability; valid for 4 months.

lesson_packages.name: Advanced Performance – 8 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Eight advanced lessons tailored for show prep or specific goals.
lesson_packages.terms: Rider must be pre-approved for advanced level.

lesson_packages.name: Advanced Competition Cycle – 12 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Twelve focused lessons leading up to your show season.
lesson_packages.terms: Weekday evenings only; valid for 6 months.

lesson_packages.name: Family Beginner Weekend Pack – 6 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Shareable package for up to 3 beginner family members on weekends.
lesson_packages.terms: Can be used by multiple family members; weekends only.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate Jump Focus – 5 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Five-lesson block concentrating on gridwork and small courses.
lesson_packages.terms: Helmet and proper footwear required; any day.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate Weekend Rider – 10 Lesson Package (2025 Pricing)
lesson_packages.description: Legacy package no longer for sale, shown for reference.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner Trial – 3 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Three-lesson trial pack for new riders to try the program.
lesson_packages.terms: New riders only; must be used within 6 weeks.

membership_plans.description: Great for active riders who want regular access to the gym and practice arena each week.
otherBenefits: One free guest audit pass per month

membership_plans.description: For dedicated riders who want expanded practice time and premium facility access.
otherBenefits: Two free guest audit passes per month

trail_rides.name: Creekside Morning Loop – 90 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Scenic morning ride along the creek and through shaded woods. Ideal for confident beginners and up.

trail_rides.name: Ridge Panorama Ride – 90 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Ride to the top of the ridge for sweeping views of the valley and barns.

trail_rides.name: Meadow Explorer – 60 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Gentle walk-only ride around the lower meadows, perfect for first-timers.

trail_rides.name: Half-Day Mountain Adventure – 180 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Challenging ride with steeper climbs and varied terrain for experienced riders.

trail_rides.name: Sunset Vista Ride – 90 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Evening ride timed to catch the sunset over the hills, with plenty of photo stops.

trail_rides.name: Family Farm Loop – 45 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Short, gentle loop past paddocks and fields, appropriate for children and nervous riders.

trail_rides.name: Creekside Afternoon Adventure – 90 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Afternoon version of our popular creekside ride with a bit more trotting.

trail_rides.name: Fall Colors Scenic Ride – 120 Minutes
trail_rides.description: Seasonal ride showcasing peak fall foliage through mixed hardwood forest.

trail_rides.name: Private Couple’s Trail – 90 Minutes
trail_rides.description: A private ride for two riders with flexible pacing and a photo break.

trail_rides.name: Morning Ridge Ride – 90 Minutes (Archived)
trail_rides.description: Legacy version of our 90-minute ridge ride, no longer offered.

trainers.bio: Dressage specialist and USDF bronze medalist focusing on balanced, sympathetic riding from Training Level through Second Level.
Level 2 dressage and groundwork trainer emphasizing relaxation, rhythm, and rider biomechanics.
Eventing coach offering dressage, stadium, and cross-country schooling with an emphasis on safety.
Hunter/jumper trainer with a focus on equitation and course strategy for juniors and adults.
Introductory trainer helping riders transition from lessons into individualized training plans.
Western and trail trainer focusing on safe, responsive horses and relaxed riders.

camp_add_ons.name: Early Drop-off (8:00 am)
camp_add_ons.description: Drop off your camper as early as 8:00 am each day. Supervised barn activities before camp starts.

camp_add_ons.name: Early Drop-off (8:00 am)
camp_add_ons.description: Early drop-off option for July Week 1 session.

camp_add_ons.name: Late Pickup (until 5:00 pm)
camp_add_ons.description: Extend your camper's day with supervised activities until 5:00 pm.

camp_add_ons.name: Extended Day (8:00 am	6:00 pm)
camp_add_ons.description: Combine early drop-off and late pickup for a full extended day.

camp_add_ons.name: Holiday Late Pickup
camp_add_ons.description: Late pickup option for the holiday break camp.

event_add_ons.name: Mini Riding Lesson Demo
event_add_ons.description: Add a 15-minute mounted mini-lesson demo after your barn tour.

event_add_ons.name: Lunch Voucher
event_add_ons.description: Includes a sandwich, drink, and snack from the on-site food truck.

event_add_ons.name: Mini Riding Lesson Demo
event_add_ons.description: Hands-on mini-lesson demonstration during the fall open house.

event_add_ons.name: Family Lunch Pack
event_add_ons.description: Discounted lunch bundle for up to 4 family members at the snack bar.

lessons.title: Beginner Group Riding Lesson
lessons.description: Introductory group lesson covering mounting, basic aids, and walk/trot in a supportive setting.

lessons.title: Weekend Beginner Group Lesson
lessons.description: Weekend-only group class for new riders focusing on steering, balance, and confidence.

lessons.title: Private Beginner Intro Lesson
lessons.description: One-on-one session ideal for first-time riders who prefer a quieter environment.

lessons.title: Nervous Rider Beginner Group
lessons.description: Slow-paced group designed for anxious riders or those returning after a break.

lessons.title: Intermediate Group Flatwork
lessons.description: Group lesson focusing on transitions, figures, and improved rider position.

lessons.title: Intermediate Jumping Group
lessons.description: Gymnastics and small courses up to 2'3" for riders with solid flatwork.

lessons.title: Private Intermediate Dressage
lessons.description: Dressage-focused private lesson working on test patterns and lateral work basics.

lessons.title: Advanced Private Jump Lesson
lessons.description: Technical course work, related distances, and show-ring strategy.

lessons.title: Advanced Equitation Group
lessons.description: Group lesson focusing on rider position over fences and on the flat.

lessons.title: Western Trail Safety Lesson
lessons.description: Learn one-handed riding, neck reining basics, and safe trail etiquette.

lessons.title: Private Western Intro Lesson
lessons.description: One-on-one introduction to western tack, cues, and jog/lope transitions.

lessons.title: Returning Adult Rider Group
lessons.description: For adults who rode in the past and want a safe, confidence-building restart.

lessons.title: Youth Horsemanship & Riding Group
lessons.description: Combination of grooming, tacking, and beginner-level riding for ages 8	12.

lessons.title: Intermediate Trail Prep Group
lessons.description: Arena-based lesson practicing obstacles and situations commonly encountered on trail.

lessons.title: Beginner Group Lesson (Legacy)
lessons.description: Archived lesson type kept for historical booking records.

training_session_types.name: Dressage Evaluation Session
training_session_types.description: One-time evaluation ride to assess horse and rider, discuss goals, and create a tailored training plan.

training_session_types.name: Dressage Tune-Up Lesson
training_session_types.description: Focused session on test accuracy, circles, and transitions for riders already in a program.

training_session_types.name: General Riding Evaluation
training_session_types.description: Evaluation of basic position, control, and goals for riders of any discipline.

training_session_types.name: Jumping Evaluation Session
training_session_types.description: Assessment over fences to determine appropriate height, pace, and coursework focus.

training_session_types.name: Eventing Schooling Session
training_session_types.description: Combination of flatwork and jumping tailored to horse and rider fitness.

training_session_types.name: Dressage Evaluation (Legacy 45-minute)
training_session_types.description: Archived shorter evaluation format kept for historical records.
